heading: Required Access
body:
To view metrics with Query Shape Insights, you
must have [Project Observability Viewer](<Project Observability Viewer>),
[Project Data Access Read Only](<Project Data Access Read Only>),
[Project Data Access Read/Write](<Project Data Access Read/Write>),
[Project Data Access Admin](<Project Data Access Admin>), or [Project Owner](<Project Owner>)
access to the project.

> **Important:** Query shapes exposing field names but redacted values may contain user
> PII (Personally Identifiable Information).
> To view truncated or full query shapes in Query Shape Insights,
> you must have one of the project roles listed above, which each give
> access to view PII (Personally Identifiable Information).
> For users without these permissions, Query Shape Insights identifies
> query shapes by their query shape hash.
